class.name: PlayFabExperimentation
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.experimentation[/code]. This service wraps client-safe PlayFab experimentation assignment APIs from the GDK PlayFab Services SDK. Methods require a signed-in [PlayFabUser], accept an optional request [Dictionary] using snake_case PlayFab field names, and return a completion [Signal] that emits [PlayFabResult]. Result payloads are converted to Godot Dictionaries and Arrays.

method.name: get_treatment_assignment_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFExperimentationGetTreatmentAssignment[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.
